name: Weaponsmithing
description: Craft blasters, melee weapons, and specialist armaments at the Toolmaker station. Weaponsmiths produce the five confirmed handgun frames — each with distinct stat profiles and combat roles.

nodes.name: Weaponsmithing
nodes.description: Foundation of the Weaponsmithing profession. Grants access to weapon crafting recipes at the Toolmaker station. Requires progress in the Crafting tree.

nodes.name: Cryostar
nodes.description: Craft the Cryostar handgun. A cryo-element pistol that applies cold and freeze status effects. Pairs well with Thaw Bones medicine in your loadout.

nodes.name: Atomizer
nodes.description: Craft the Atomizer handgun. A high-rate energy pistol that excels at sustained fire. Quality stat affects damage output.

nodes.name: Pulsar
nodes.description: Craft the Pulsar handgun. A burst-fire pistol that delivers high damage in short pulses. Effective at medium range.

nodes.name: Spitfire
nodes.description: Craft the Spitfire handgun. A rapid-fire pistol with high potential stat requirements. Trades accuracy for volume of fire.

nodes.name: Voltstar
nodes.description: Craft the Voltstar handgun. An electric-element pistol that applies the electric status. Watt Away medicine counters its effect on allies.

nodes.name: Melee Weapons
nodes.description: Craft close-quarters melee weapons. Precise recipes and weapon types are under development as the combat system expands.

nodes.name: Masterwork Weapons
nodes.description: Produce high-PQRV weapons with superior stat ceilings. Requires rare materials and advanced crafting skill.
